results.question: Which 3 businesses received the highest number of reviews with ratings of 4.5 or higher during 2019? Include their names and the count of high-rating reviews.
results.agent_answer: Encino Dermatology & Laser: Alex Khadavi MD, 19; The Boochyard @ Local Roots, 17; Aurora Massage, 14

args.sql: SELECT gmap_id, COUNT(rating) AS review_count FROM review WHERE rating >= 4.5 AND time LIKE "%2019%" GROUP BY gmap_id ORDER BY review_count DESC LIMIT 3
SELECT name, gmap_id FROM business_description WHERE gmap_id IN ('gmap_35', 'gmap_53', 'gmap_20')
